channel.title: openpv - Produkte und Dienstleistungen
channel.description: Das Team von openpv.de bietet Dienstleistungen im Bereich 3D-Gebäude- und Vegetationsdaten in Deutschland an - ideal für Anwendungen in Planung, Simulation und Visualisierung.

item.title: OpenPV at the 39th Chaos Communication Congress
item.author: Florian Kotthoff
item.description:
OpenPV at the 39th Chaos Communication Congress

Just as last year, we will be at the 39c3 - the congress of the chaos computer club.

item.title: New feature - displaying azimuth and tilt angle of every 3D building
item.author: Florian Kotthoff
item.description:
New feature - displaying azimuth and tilt angle of every 3D building

We have implemented a new feature - at openpv.de the azimuth and tilt angle are now shown in the UI.

item.title: OpenPV at the 38th Chaos Communication Congress
item.author: Florian Kotthoff
item.description:
OpenPV at the 38th Chaos Communication Congress

This years 38c3, the conference of the Chaos Communication Club, took place in Hamburg from 27th to 30th of december, 2024. From OpenPV, both @magro and me (@floko) joined this conference. We presented OpenPV at the congress at the very first evening. You can find our talk on

  • media.ccc.de

item.title: Modelling Diffuse Radiation
item.author: Florian Kotthoff
item.description:
Modelling Diffuse Radiation

PV systems can use two different sources of sun radiation to generate electricity. The obvious source is the direct radiation, meaning the light coming directly from the sun. The second source is the diffuse radiation, ie the radiation which is reflected by air particles and then hitting the PV panel. Hence, the blue of the sky is the second source of energy for PV systems.
